exercises.name: Land Mine Reverse Lunge
exercises.description: Land Mine Reverse Lunge

exercises.name: Landmine Alternating Lunges
exercises.description: Hold the barbell at chest height. Perform alternating forward lunges, lowering your back knee toward the ground and keeping your torso upright.

exercises.name: Landmine Alternating Rotation Lunge
exercises.alternateName: Landmine Alternating reverse lunge with twist
exercises.description: Lunge forward and rotate the torso while pressing the bar overhead. Alternate legs each rep.

exercises.name: Landmine Anti-Rotations
exercises.description: Hold the bar and resist its movement as it tries to rotate your torso. Maintain square shoulders and tight core.

exercises.name: Landmine Bent Over Row
exercises.description:
Stand facing the barbell and hinge at the hips. 

Hold the barbell with both hands and pull it toward your chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together. 

Lower with control.

exercises.name: Landmine Bent-Over Row with Handle
exercises.alternateName: Landmine Bent-Over Row with Double D Handle
exercises.description: Hinge at the hips with a flat back, holding the barbell with both hands. Pull the bar toward your torso, squeezing your shoulder blades together. Lower with control. Targets the upper back.

exercises.name: Landmine Box Squat
exercises.description: Sit back into a squat onto a box while holding the bar. Pause briefly on the box before standing up.

exercises.name: Landmine Bulgarian Split Squat
exercises.description: Elevate your rear foot on a bench. Hold the bar at chest level. Lower into a Bulgarian split squat, keeping your torso upright.

exercises.name: Landmine Chest Fly Push-Up
exercises.description: Perform a push-up on the floor with hands gripping the barbell sleeves. As you push up, squeeze chest muscles inward for a fly effect.

exercises.name: Landmine Clean & Press
exercises.description: Clean the bar to shoulder height and press overhead. This is an explosive, full-body move.

exercises.name: Landmine Crunch
exercises.description: Landmine Crunch

exercises.name: Landmine Curtsy Lunges
exercises.description: Hold the bar with both hands and step one leg back and across into a curtsy lunge. Keep the bar stable and chest upright.

exercises.name: Landmine Deadlift
exercises.description: Stand with feet hip-width apart. Hinge at the hips to lower the bar toward the ground, then stand back up by driving through the hips.

exercises.name: Landmine Drop Lunge to Press
exercises.description: Lunge backward and press the bar overhead in one motion. Return to standing and repeat.

exercises.name: Landmine Extended Rotations
exercises.description: Extend your arms further from your body while rotating the bar side-to-side to increase core challenge.

exercises.name: Landmine Front Squat
exercises.description: Hold the bar in a front-rack position. Keep your elbows high as you squat down. Maintain a tall chest and stable core throughout.

exercises.name: Landmine Glute Bridge
exercises.description: Lie on your back with feet flat and knees bent. Hold the bar across your hips and press upward into a glute bridge.

exercises.name: Landmine Good Morning
exercises.description: Hold the bar across your upper back. Hinge at the hips and lower your torso forward. Engage hamstrings and glutes to return upright.

exercises.name: Landmine Hack Squat
exercises.description: Stand holding the bar in front. Lean slightly back and squat, mimicking a hack squat motion. Drive through your heels to stand.

exercises.name: Landmine Half-Kneeling Single Arm Press
exercises.description: Kneel with one knee up (half-kneeling stance). Hold the barbell in the hand opposite the forward leg. Press upward and forward. Engage glutes and core to stabilize. Switch sides.

exercises.name: Landmine High Pull
exercises.description: Stand holding the bar with both hands. Explosively pull the bar up toward chest height, driving with hips and leading with elbows. Keep the bar close to the body.

exercises.name: Landmine Hip Thrust
exercises.description: Rest your upper back against a bench. Hold the bar at your hips and thrust your hips upward, squeezing the glutes at the top.

exercises.name: Landmine Iso Squat with Press
exercises.alternateName: Landmine Squat hold with shoulder Press
exercises.description: Hold the bar at shoulder height with both hands. Lower into a squat and press the bar as you hold the squat. Maintain an isometric squat while pressing.

exercises.name: Landmine Jump Squat
exercises.description: Hold the bar and perform a small jump from the squat position. Absorb the landing with soft knees.

exercises.name: Landmine kickstand Deadlift
exercises.alternateName: landmine Staggered, b-stance, split stance, offset RDL, deadlift
exercises.description: Stagger your stance with one foot slightly back. Hinge at the hips and perform a deadlift, keeping the bar close. Alternate sides.

exercises.name: Landmine Kneeling Anti-Rotation
exercises.description: Kneel on both knees. Hold the bar in both hands and push it away while keeping your torso stable. Return with control.

exercises.name: Landmine Kneeling Hip Thrust
exercises.description: Kneel on both knees, holding the bar at chest height. Sit back onto your heels and drive up to full kneeling. Repeat.

exercises.name: Landmine Kneeling Shoulder Press
exercises.description: Kneel on both knees facing the bar, holding it at shoulder level with one or both hands. Press the bar upward and forward until the arm(s) are fully extended. Great for stability and shoulder work.

exercises.name: Landmine Lateral B Stance Deadlift
exercises.description: Perform a lateral lunge while holding the barbell, with a staggered stance for added stability. Focus on controlled movement and alternating sides.

exercises.name: Landmine Lateral Clean
exercises.description: Use an explosive hip drive to bring the bar laterally to shoulder height. Great for athletic power.

exercises.name: Landmine Lateral Curtsy Lunge to Knee Drive
exercises.description: Perform a side lunge and bring the rear leg into a curtsy position. Hold the bar for balance and resistance.

exercises.name: Landmine Lateral Deadlift
exercises.description:
Stand sideways to the barbell, holding it with one hand. 

Step out into a lateral lunge, lowering the barbell toward the floor. 

Push back to standing and alternate sides.

exercises.name: Landmine Lateral Hinge
exercises.description:
Hold the barbell with both hands and perform a lateral hip hinge, focusing on glutes and hamstrings. 

Return to standing and alternate sides.

exercises.name: Landmine Lateral Hop Press
exercises.alternateName: landmine side skater to single arm press
exercises.description: Hold the bar in one hand. Perform a lateral hop and press the bar overhead. Land softly and repeat.

exercises.name: Landmine Lateral Lunge
exercises.description:
Hold the barbell with one hand at chest height. 

Step out to the side into a lunge, keeping the other leg straight. Push back to the starting position. Alternate sides.

exercises.name: Landmine Lateral Press
exercises.description: Hold the bar in one hand at shoulder height. Press the bar out laterally to the side, fully extending the arm. Engage your core to resist rotation.

exercises.name: Landmine Lateral Squat
exercises.alternateName: Landmine static side lunge, landmine cossack squat
exercises.description: Hold the barbell at chest height. Step out into a wide stance and perform a squat, focusing on shifting weight from one leg to the other.

exercises.name: Landmine Leg Raise
exercises.description: Lie on your back holding the bar vertically. Raise your legs toward the ceiling, keeping your core tight. Lower and repeat.
